cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start of the song. The partners are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Now, throughout the song, there are several partner switches. Let me list them out step by step. The problem says: 1. Claire and Bob switch partners. 2. Claire and Alice switch partners. 3. Bob and Claire switch partners. 4. Eve and Bob switch partners. 5. Dave and Claire switch partners. I need to track who Claire is dancing with after each of these steps. Let me start by writing down the initial pairings: Initial: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Izzi - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Let's go step by step. Step 1: Claire and Bob switch partners. So, before this step, Claire is with Sam and Bob is with Izzi. After switching, Claire will have Bob's partner (Izzi), and Bob will have Claire's partner (Sam). So now: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Sam - Claire: Izzi - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Step 2: Claire and Alice switch partners. Before this step, Claire is with Izzi and Alice is with Lola. After switching, Claire will have Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice will have Claire's partner (Izzi). So now: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Sam - Claire: Lola - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Step 3: Bob and
